intent: An orchestrator invents the subtask list at runtime from the objective, dispatches each subtask to a fitting worker profile, integrates results, and may re-plan once from what came back.

state.subtasks: array of { id, brief, profile_ref, status }
state.results: object keyed by subtask id (result | typed_failure)

edges.when: for each subtask; independent subtasks run concurrently

termination: integration complete, or planning rounds exhausted — exhaustion delivers the partial integration plus the named gaps
